race.name: Storlirennet
race.tagline: A cross-border freestyle race from Sweden to Norway — 35 kilometers from Storlien across the Scandinavian divide into Meraaker.

climate.description: The Storlien-Meraaker area on the Swedish-Norwegian border has reliable winter conditions. Typical Scandinavian mountain climate.
challenges: Mountain border weather can be harsh
Wind exposure on open mountain sections

course.primary: 35km point-to-point freestyle course from Storlien, Sweden across the Scandinavian mountains to Meraaker, Norway. Crosses the national border mid-race.
features: Cross-border race from Sweden to Norway
New addition to Ski Classics Challengers

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Unique cross-border concept with Ski Classics backing gives this new race strong potential, though it lacks established history.

history.summary: Storlirennet is a new cross-border ski race from Storlien in Sweden to Meraaker in Norway, added to the Ski Classics Challengers calendar. The course crosses the Scandinavian mountain divide between the two countries.
notable_facts: Cross-border race from Sweden to Norway
New addition to Ski Classics Challengers calendar
